notes: Water golden (user's own account, Bandit Tycoon MC = dagger/gun), line-complete except EX Might: the local party data now has Clarion Attack Awakening Lv15, but later controlled Proven captures show that should add EX Might +15 and this older panel does not include it. The EX Might assertion is skipped until the party snapshot is rebuilt; the other rows remain useful. First capture of the Δ Pendulum package on Staff of Renunciation tr5 — C.B. DMG Cap 50 (base skill) + FC DMG Cap 20 (the lv210 +10% Fated Chain cap upgraded to 20% at lv240; modeled as two additive +10 rows gated on transcendence_step 1/4, per gbf.wiki Dark Opus Weapons). FC DMG Cap is a NEW boost type + panel line (fc_dmg_cap, after C.B. DMG Cap — the in-game order here). Locks the Sephirath specialty gate: Worldbreaking Tauros 4★ carries Sephirath Corant II (amplify skill DMG 10% for melee/harp-specialty allies) and the panel shows NOTHING for this dagger/gun MC — skill_amp_sp is in the absent list. (Contrast qBOvon, where the submitter's unknown class presumably matched Eparc II's sabre/bow.) Sephirath base skills are Arcarum/Sandbox-only (arcarum condition flag). Remove-and-diff pair closed the old EX ledger exactly without Clarion awakening: no-Twinfall capture (EX 58, Might/EX Sp/DA/TA/DEF/DMG Cap/C.A. DMG/C.A. Cap gone, HP 120; Estimated 74617/110392/35470) proves Dualblade Flash's Bond II dagger tier = EX 40 + DA 15 + TA 10 + C.A. DMG 20 + C.A. Cap 15 + DMG Cap 10 and Guiding Star's Splendor = Might 30/HP 30/DEF 25; no-Clarion capture (Kris of Hypnos MH: EX 63, Might 50.3 = 30 + Primacy 14.5x1.4, DA 22 = 15 + Primacy 5x1.4, EX Sp 32 = Voltage II 8x4 daggers, C.A. Cap 30 = 15 + Excelsior 15; Estimated 144498/213777/41557) proves Kris adds no EX atk. Both give Armed Flood SL20 = 35 (98 = 35+23+40 and 58 = 35+23) for the pre-awakening Clarion state. Bond II's EN-wiki '(Boost to elemental ATK...)' clause is a phantom — no E. ATK line in any of the three captures and the JP text has no elemental-ATK clause. e_atk row deleted, e_atk in the absent list (E. ATK and E. ATK (Prog.) are distinct stats — the Prog 6.6 here is Aquamarine Hatchet's Oceansoul's Progression III, 1.5x4.4). Estimated 147248 / 217845 / 41435.
